description: A landscape-format graphic with a vintage-film color grade (teal sky, warm skin tones, light grain and lens artifacts). The image is shot from a low angle behind Trump, seen from the back and side with blond hair, raising his right hand toward the sky. To the left, a large American flag waves on a pole. Overhead in the teal sky, two military aircraft fly: a fighter jet (upper center) and a B-2 stealth bomber (upper right). In glowing white condensed caps to the right is the text 'SECOND TO NONE.' Per the tweet, the text states Trump is the first president in decades to ensure all net job growth goes to American-born workers ('AMERICANS FIRST').
